_comment: s&box Dedicated Server egg. SteamCMD app id 1892930. Sourced from sbox.game/dev/doc/networking/dedicated-servers (April 2026).
name: s&box Dedicated Server
author: ops@local
description: Facepunch s&box dedicated server (.NET 8 native). Installs via SteamCMD with account login (app 1892930 is not anonymous-eligible). The Linux build currently lives on the staging branch (depot 1892933) — see SBOX_BRANCH variable.
startup: bash -c 'KIND=$(cat .sbox-binary-kind 2>/dev/null || echo windows); if [ "$KIND" = native ] && [ -x ./sbox-server ]; then BIN=./sbox-server; else BIN=./sbox-server.exe; fi; set -- "$BIN"; if [ -n "{{SBOX_PROJECT}}" ] && [ -f "projects/{{SBOX_PROJECT}}" ]; then set -- "$@" +game "projects/{{SBOX_PROJECT}}"; else set -- "$@" +game {{SBOX_GAME}}; fi; [ -n "{{SBOX_MAP}}" ] && set -- "$@" {{SBOX_MAP}}; set -- "$@" +hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}" +port {{SERVER_PORT}}; [ -n "{{QUERY_PORT}}" ] && set -- "$@" +net_query_port {{QUERY_PORT}}; [ -n "{{MAX_PLAYERS}}" ] && set -- "$@" +maxplayers {{MAX_PLAYERS}}; [ -n "{{TOKEN}}" ] && set -- "$@" +net_game_server_token {{TOKEN}}; [ "{{ENABLE_DIRECT_CONNECT}}" = "1" ] && set -- "$@" +net_hide_address 0; set -- "$@" {{EXTRA_ARGS}}; exec "$@"'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# s&box installer.
# App 1892930 is not anonymous-eligible; we log in with STEAM_USERNAME / STEAM_PASSWORD.
# Email Steam Guard handled in two rounds:
#   Round 1: STEAM_GUARD blank -> login fails fast, Steam emails the code.
#   Round 2: paste code into STEAM_GUARD, reinstall, sentry caches under /mnt/server/.steam/.
#   Round 3+: leave STEAM_GUARD blank, sentry handles it.
set -e

apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl tar lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates wget unzip file rsync findutils coreutils

if [ -z "${STEAM_USERNAME}" ] || [ -z "${STEAM_PASSWORD}" ]; then
    echo '================================================================'
    echo 'ERROR: STEAM_USERNAME and STEAM_PASSWORD must be set on this server.'
    echo 'App 1892930 (s&box dedicated server) is not anonymously available;'
    echo 'an account that owns s&box is required.'
    echo '================================================================'
    exit 1
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/.steam /mnt/server/Steam
ln -sfn /mnt/server/Steam /mnt/server/.steam/root
ln -sfn /mnt/server/Steam /mnt/server/.steam/steam

cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar -xz

BETA_FLAG=""
if [ -n "${SBOX_BRANCH}" ]; then
    BETA_FLAG="-beta ${SBOX_BRANCH}"
fi

run_steamcmd() {
    local platform="$1"
    local -a args=(
        +@ShutdownOnFailedCommand 1
        +@NoPromptForPassword 1
        +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType "${platform}"
        +force_install_dir /mnt/server
    )
    if [ -n "${STEAM_GUARD}" ]; then
        args+=( +set_steam_guard_code "${STEAM_GUARD}" )
        args+=( +login "${STEAM_USERNAME}" "${STEAM_PASSWORD}" "${STEAM_GUARD}" )
    else
        args+=( +login "${STEAM_USERNAME}" "${STEAM_PASSWORD}" )
    fi
    args+=( +app_update ${SBOX_APP_ID} ${BETA_FLAG} validate +quit )

    echo "=== SteamCMD attempt: platform=${platform} branch=${SBOX_BRANCH:-public} (user=${STEAM_USERNAME}, guard=$( [ -n \"${STEAM_GUARD}\" ] && echo provided || echo blank )) ==="
    HOME=/mnt/server ./steamcmd.sh "${args[@]}" || echo "steamcmd exited non-zero (continuing)"
}

find_server_binary() {
    find /mnt/server -maxdepth 6 -type f \( -name 'sbox-server.exe' -o -name 'sbox-server' \) 2>/dev/null | head -n 1
}

# Try linux first (native binary preferred), then fall back to windows depot if Steam refuses linux for this branch.
run_steamcmd linux
FOUND="$(find_server_binary || true)"

if [ -z "${FOUND}" ]; then
    echo 'linux platform produced no server binary — retrying as windows'
    run_steamcmd windows
    FOUND="$(find_server_binary || true)"
fi

if [ -z "${FOUND}" ]; then
    echo '================================================================'
    echo 'ERROR: install did not produce sbox-server(.exe).'
    if [ -z "${STEAM_GUARD}" ]; then
        echo 'Likely cause: this is the FIRST install on this Steam account/device.'
        echo 'Steam should have just emailed you a Steam Guard code.'
        echo 'Open the panel -> Variables tab, paste the code into STEAM_GUARD,'
        echo 'and click Reinstall again. Leave it blank after that.'
    else
        echo 'A guard code was provided but the depot still did not download.'
        echo 'Possible causes: bad code, expired code (>15 min), wrong password,'
        echo 'account does not own s&box, branch typo, or two-factor mobile guard.'
    fi
    echo '----------------------------------------------------------------'
    echo 'Depot contents under /mnt/server:'
    find /mnt/server -maxdepth 5 -type f | head -200
    echo '================================================================'
    exit 1
fi

echo "Found server binary: ${FOUND}"
file "${FOUND}" || true

FOUND_DIR="$(dirname "${FOUND}")"
if [ "${FOUND_DIR}" != "/mnt/server" ]; then
    echo "Lifting ${FOUND_DIR} -> /mnt/server"
    rsync -a "${FOUND_DIR}/" /mnt/server/
fi

chmod +x /mnt/server/sbox-server.exe 2>/dev/null || true
chmod +x /mnt/server/sbox-server 2>/dev/null || true

if [ -f /mnt/server/sbox-server ]; then
    echo 'native' > /mnt/server/.sbox-binary-kind
else
    echo 'windows' > /mnt/server/.sbox-binary-kind
fi

echo 'Install complete. /mnt/server top-level:'
ls -la /mnt/server
echo "binary kind: $(cat /mnt/server/.sbox-binary-kind)"

variables.name: Steam Username
variables.description: Steam account login name. Account must own s&box.

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Steam account password. Stored encrypted in the panel database.

variables.name: Steam Guard (email code)
variables.description: Email Steam Guard code. First install: leave blank, hit Reinstall, you get an email, paste the code here, hit Reinstall again. Clear it after that — sentry file at /home/container/.steam caches the device.

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: SteamCMD app id for the s&box dedicated server. Default 1892930.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Steam beta branch. Linux-native binary currently lives on 'staging' — leave 'staging' until Facepunch promotes it to public. Blank = public/stable.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Hostname shown in the server browser. Avoid bare ampersands (&) — Pterodactyl HTML-escapes them. Use 'and' instead.

variables.name: Game Package
variables.description: Game package ident to load (e.g. facepunch.sandbox). Ignored when Local Project is set.

variables.name: Map Package
variables.description: Optional map package ident (e.g. facepunch.flatgrass). Leave blank to let the game pick.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used for server browser queries (+net_query_port).

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum players. Leave blank to use the gamemode default. Some gamemodes ignore this.

variables.name: Local Project (.sbproj)
variables.description: Optional. Relative path under /home/container/projects/ to a .sbproj file (e.g. mygame/mygame.sbproj). Overrides the Game Package field when set and the file exists.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Optional Steam game server login token (+net_game_server_token). Generate at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers. Lets the server keep the same Steam ID across restarts.

variables.name: Direct Connect
variables.description: 1 = expose IP/port for direct connection (sets +net_hide_address 0). 0 = Steam relay only. Experimental.

variables.name: Extra Startup Args
variables.description: Appended verbatim to the sbox-server command line.
